programme.title: Lockup: New Jersey: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A gang leader has his authority challenged by another inmate but questions arise over whether the challenger is who he says he is; in the women's wing, one inmate's personality divides her housing unit; before long, verbal altercations turn violent.

programme.title: Lockup: New Jersey: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A threat against an officer leads to a major shakedown; an alleged gang leader becomes a magnet for trouble; a high-speed chase ends with the discovery of a 21-year-old murder victim and now the jail must deal with her cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Lockup: New Jersey: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A police shootout leaves a paroled inmate in the hospital with 14 bullet wounds and two other men are arrested for their connection to him; a female inmate arrives with what she says is a hair salon mishap, but officers suspect something else.

programme.title: Lockup: New Jersey: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A new inmate tries to adjust to life in jail, but finds himself with a target on his back and the victim of violence; a drug smuggling scheme is uncovered in the jail's mailroom and a suspect is identified.

programme.title: Lockup: New Jersey: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A dangerous drug makes a comeback in the city of Hackensack, but this time with an "all in the family" twist; inmates are provided with cameras to record their intimate thoughts.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The High Priestess, Part 2
programme.desc: The team attempts to escape the submarine with scuba gear as it sinks under attacks from the shape-changing enemy Stand "High Priestess."

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Iggy the Fool and Geb's N'doul, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends finally land in Egypt, where DIO awaits, and are cutting through the desert when a helicopter approaches. The helicopter belongs to the Speedwagon Foundation and is there to make a special delivery requested by Joseph.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Iggy the Fool and Geb's N'doul, Part 2
programme.desc: Jotaro and crew acquire the help of Iggy but are ambushed by a water Stand. With Kakyoin injured, Avdol tries out a stratagem which the unseen enemy quickly sees through. Meanwhile, Iggy is napping.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Khnum's Zenyatta and Thoth's Mondatta
programme.desc: After the battle with N'doul, Kakyoin and Avdol are badly hurt, so the group heads for a hospital in Aswan. Unfortunately, dangerous enemies could be all around them even there.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 1
programme.desc: A young man named Chaka finds a mysterious sword on the beach. Though other men try, Chaka is the only one who can draw it. The sword claims Chaka as its master and sends the youth in pursuit of Jotaro and his friends with deadly intent.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 2
programme.desc: Having defeated the "Anubis" Stand user Chaka, Polnareff pays a visit to a barber. But when the barber starts attacking him with Chaka's sword, the Frenchman realizes the sword itself is the Stand user.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 1
programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterward, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 2
programme.desc: Due to the powers of an enemy Stand, Joseph's body becomes magnetized. While chasing after the woman he suspects is the Stand user, Joseph learns that Avdol has also become magnetized from touching a different electrical outlet.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 1
programme.desc: With Joseph and Avdol busy fighting Mariah, Jotaro and Polnareff get concerned about why they haven't shown up yet. As the two search Luxor, Polnareff senses someone following them and confronts the man.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 2
programme.desc: The power of Alessi's Stand "Set" has turned Polnareff back into a child, leaving him confused and alone. A passerby named Marena takes the boy into her home to help him, but they are followed by Alessi and his terrible powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 1
programme.desc: After a long journey, Jotaro and his friends finally reach Cairo. They begin asking about the location of DIO's palace and find one man who says he has information, but will only answer if the group can beat him in a game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 2
programme.desc: After losing to D'Arby, Joseph and Polnareff have their souls taken. In order to have their souls returned, Jotaro shows off Star Platinum's powers before beginning a match with D'Arby, warning him that cheating won't work.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 1
programme.desc: Hol Horse arrives at Cairo in order to pursue Jotaro and the others. He has joined forces with another partner and is after the lives of Jotaro and crew once more. What's more, his new partner is none other than Mondatta.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 2
programme.desc: Following Mondatta's prediction, Hol Horse sticks his fingers into Polnareff's nose, but he doesn't know what to do from there. Making matters worse, Jotaro and the others show up in search of Polnareff, forcing Hol Horse into a tough spot.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends continue to search for DIO's mansion in Cairo. Following Avdol's advice, they have a beggar look for the mansion and wait. Meanwhile, Iggy, wandering the city alone, is confronted by two large dogs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 2
programme.desc: Iggy ends up in a battle to the death in the sewers against Pet Shop, the falcon that guards DIO's mansion. Despite being injured, Iggy runs to the river in an attempt to escape, but he may have underestimated Pet Shop's abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 1
programme.desc: Though purchased dearly with Iggy's injury, Jotaro and his group finally have the location of DIO's palace. Waiting for them where they find the butler, Darby Younger, brother of the gambler they previously defeated.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 2
programme.desc: The battle for souls with D'Arby continues. Kakyoin challenges D'Arby to a racing game but ends up losing both the race and his soul. Before Joseph really has time to react, Jotaro picks the next game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 1
programme.desc: The baseball game with D'Arby continues within DIO's mansion. For some reason, Jotaro starts telling D'Arby what pitches he'll be throwing. D'Arby finds Jotaro's actions strange, but still believes he has the upper hand because of his Stand's abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 2
programme.desc: After a long, hard journey, the group is suddenly faced with saying goodbye to a friend. Polnareff can't control his emotions and starts brandishing his sword toward an unseen enemy with very little success.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 3
programme.desc: Polnareff is pushed to his limits by Cool Ice's merciless attacks. As he awaits death, the dying Iggy manages to save him at the last minute. Polnareff then stabs Cool Ice in the head. Despite showing resilience to the attacks so far.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 1
programme.desc: Polnareff finally comes face-to-face with DIO. Despite Polnareff's hostility, DIO offers to forgive him and allow the Frenchman to join his side again. Polnareff refuses, but for some reason, he cannot get any closer to DIO.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 2
programme.desc: As night falls, the battle expands to encompass the whole city of Cairo. Amidst the melee, Kakyoin says he has a way to figure out DIO's Stand ability.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The High Priestess, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and the others obtain a submarine as a new means of transport, but as they travel through the Red Sea they realize that there are few places to escape to should danger arise underwater.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The High Priestess, Part 2
programme.desc: The team attempts to escape the submarine with scuba gear as it sinks under attacks from the shape-changing enemy Stand "High Priestess."

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Iggy the Fool and Geb's N'doul, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends finally land in Egypt, where DIO awaits, and are cutting through the desert when a helicopter approaches. The helicopter belongs to the Speedwagon Foundation and is there to make a special delivery requested by Joseph.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Anita Manning and James Braxton begin the final day of their road trip in the town of Needham Market in Suffolk, ending with a crowning auction in Greenwich.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Margie Cooper kick off their Scottish road trip in Jedburgh, then travel through Powburn and Alnwick to an auction in Edinburgh.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Margie Cooper begin the day in the Scottish capital of Edinburgh, travel through Dunfermline, and head to Stirlingshire for an auction at Kinbuck.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The third leg of the trip for Charlie Ross and Margie Cooper begins at Perth and heads to the North Sea coast for an auction in Fife at St Andrews.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Charlie Ross and Margie Cooper begin the day at Abernyte in Perth and Kinross, before heading to an auction in the Highlands at Dingwall.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the last day of their Scottish road trip, Charlie Ross and Margie Cooper begin at Nairnshire in Auldearn before traveling through Aberdeenshire and heading to auction at Hamilton, South Lanarkshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Thomas Plant kick off the week in the seaside town of Morecambe, traveling through Cornforth and Chorely on their way to auction in Clitheroe town.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road trippers Paul Laidlaw and Thomas Plant start their second day in Preston, Lancashire before they make their way towards an auction in the Cheshire town of Nantwich.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Thomas Plant begin the day in Birmingham before traveling through Lichfield, Shenton, and Leicester ending up at an auction in Stamford, Lincolnshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Thomas Plant kick off the fourth day of their road trip in Cromer, Norfolk, and make their way through Holt and Norwich to the auction at Colchester, Essex.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On their final day, Paul Laidlaw and Thomas Plant begin in Wendover, Buckinghamshire, and wind their way to auction in Bedford.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The first day of Mark Stacey and Catherine Southon's Scottish road trip begins in the village of New Abbey, takes them from Dumfries and Galloway through Ayrshire and into Renfrewshire, and finishes at an auction in Paisley.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The second day of the trip for Mark Stacey and Catherine Southon starts in Glasgow before passing through Falkirk on the way to the auction in Dundee.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road trippers Mark Stacey and Catherine Southon start in Dundee and travel through Forfar and Invururie on their way to auction in Aberdeen.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Minehead Railway Station, where items include a 19th-century washing machine and an exquisite miniature of Napoleon.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Cardiff Castle, Fiona Bruce is on the hunt for a rare 1933 pennyworth a small fortune while one expert finds a piece he has been waiting 40 years to see.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are in Belfast, outside the Parliament Buildings. Treasures include diving gear associated with the Titanic.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Trelissick House in Cornwall. Items of interest include an escape pod from a Vulcan bomber and a miniature sewing kit.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Helmingham Hall in Suffolk. Treasures include a dazzling sapphire ring and a Girl Guide sketch by Robert Baden-Powell.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team is in Leicester at the historic Abbey Pumping Station.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team are in Belfast at the Parliament Buildings on the Stormont Estate. Treasures turning up include a unique George Best collection and Titanic memorabilia.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team returns to Leicester's Abbey Pumping Station, where treasures include a 1960s sculpture and a set of exotic boxes with an intriguing use.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team are at Newcastle's Civic Centre - a towering modernist building packed with technical innovations well ahead of their time.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: As part of its 40th anniversary series, Antiques Roadshow returns for a second helping of finds from the Isle of Wight. The picturesque location is Osborne House.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A celebration of the achievements of some of Britain's most inspirational women, filmed in the Houses of Parliament and marking 100 years since women first won the right to cast their vote in 1918.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This special episode, filmed at the Etaples Military Cemetery in France, presents a selection of the most emotive and poignant items chosen by the team to mark the end of World War I and its aftermath.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: A glimpse into what the future holds for the Galapagos as man and ocean currents have brought change to the islands.

programme.title: Wild New Zealand
programme.desc: Untouched since the dawn of time, evolution runs riot in New Zealand to create some of the rarest and most unusual wildlife on Earth.

programme.title: Wild New Zealand
programme.desc: Male sea lions brawl for mating rights and females give birth on a sandy beach in the Auckland Islands, located halfway between New Zealand and Antarctica.

programme.title: Wild New Zealand
programme.desc: Four penguin species begin breeding every winter in four very different and rugged locations on New Zealand's South Island.

programme.title: Wild Japan
programme.desc: The central island of Honshu is home to over 100 million people, but is also home to an astonishing range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Japan
programme.desc: In the far south of Japan, there is a a place where all life is influenced by the power of the sea, and where volcanoes and typhoons are forces to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Wild Japan
programme.desc: Japan's northernmost island, Hokkaido is a place totally unlike the rest of the country. Every year it swings from a bitter Siberian winter into the warmth of a Mediterranean-like summer.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The riches of the Caribbean and the processes that shape them.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: An exploration of the stunning underwater treasures of the Caribbean Sea, including the world's second largest barrier reef and countless shipwrecks.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The survival stories of the islands' wildlife residents following the Caribbean hurricane season.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The wild shore of Central America is the Caribbean's more mysterious side, with beautiful archipelagos of hundreds of islands and wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Thailand
programme.desc: An exploration of southern Thailand, a natural wonderland of spectacular beauty, wild parties and pervading spirituality.

programme.title: Wild Thailand
programme.desc: Nature finds a way of living alongside people in central Thailand's forests, fertile plains and city streets.

programme.title: Wild Thailand
programme.desc: In the jungles of Phu Khieo live the leaf monkeys, unusual primates that eat the leaves of a hundred different types of plant.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The Hairy Bikers head to Kristiansund on the coast of Norway to meet specialist artisan bakers.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: Dave and Si journey through the Netherlands, where they bake lazybones buns beside a windmill.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The guys travel from the wine region of the Rhine Valley to the spiritual home of beer, Bavaria, and discover Germany's passion for bread of every shape, size and flavor.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The Hairy Bikers travel to the furthest corners of Europe, culminating in a fun family party thrown by Dave's Romanian wife, Lil.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The bikers tour the home of Mozart and Arnold Schwarzenegger, starting in the patisserie capital of the world, Vienna.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: The bikers abandon their bikes in favor of gondolas and cook up focaccia, stromboli and eat a pasta pie on the back streets of Ferrara.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Bakeation
programme.desc: In Lyon, Dave and Si explore the `bouchon', a restaurant normally run by a female chef.

programme.title: Castles of Horror
programme.desc: Visits to castles throughout Europe reveal that thousands died because of their religious beliefs.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George takes on an Edwardian home suffering from an extreme case of 1970s wall-to-wall paneling; he also tackles a mock Tudor cottage in Hastings.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George works on a stripped Victorian terrace in Plumstead, looking to create a new layout that won't break the bank; he also visits a magnificent villa near Liverpool.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George works on a tricky conversion of a beautiful Arts and Crafts building; he works on an 18th-century country pub saddled with some dodgy DIY.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George helps a young couple make sense of their Victorian terrace house; he visits a woman converting two listed cottages into a family home.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George squeezes into an Edwardian Workers Cottage which is only half the size of a squash court, and visits a house with overwhelmingly Italian decor.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George visits a handsome turn-of-the-century terraced home whose new owners are set on a monochrome color scheme, and a workshop that makes antique effect mirrors.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George is out and about with his sledgehammer, knocking holes in a fake Tudor ceiling in Leamington Spa, and moving doors in a farmhouse on the edge of the Peak District.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Up a long garden path is a Victorian villa that's Jawad and Charlie's labor of love; George hopes for a clean sweep with a redundant chimney.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George has some radical ideas to redesign an Edwardian home; he tackles a Victorian mishmash, some MDF, a quirky fireplace and a random room.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George offers a sympathetic hand with a monster Victorian semi and a beautiful Regency conversion.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: In West Yorkshire, Pip is moving back into the home that she grew up in and is finding it emotional; there's a mystery house in west London.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George takes on a project that is part period house, part dog's dinner; the thought of a corner cocktail bar proves a real tonic for a tricky refurb project.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George tackles a heavy chandelier in a Georgian townhouse in Yorkshire, England; a farmhouse in the Peak District, England, is a decorative nightmare.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen a una fuerza de tarea antidrogas para rastrear a un proveedor de drogas. Baez entra en contacto con las sustancias y pronto lucha por su vida debido a una sobredosis accidental.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Erin está conflictuada cuando Jamie y Eddie le piden que elimine los cargos antiguos contra Parker Mack (Spencer House), un hombre que valientemente rescató a una mujer de una situación de rehenes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está detrás de un cirujano que hace amputaciones innecesarias.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo trata de encontrar una vínculo común entre cuatro hombres desaparecidos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a Miami para localizar a un delincuente que asesina a trabajadoras sexuales en un estilo similar a la matanza de animales.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo investiga los cadáveres quemados de varios indigentes cerca del muelle de Santa Mónica en California.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Los planes de vacaciones del equipo se suspenden cuando la investigación del asesinato de un veterano de la Marina incluye el descubrimiento de un bebé recién nacido que no tiene identificación ni vínculos aparentes con una familia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El Secretario de Defensa de los Estados Unidos, Wynn Crawford, cierra la investigación de asesinato de Gibbs y exige que los agentes especiales McGee y Torres sean arrestados por sus acciones en el caso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un viejo amigo de la familia, el Cabo del Ejército John Sydney, suplica a Gibbs que se una a él en un viaje por carretera para buscar un brazalete de I.D. militar desaparecido.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que un niño de 9 años desnutrido y confundido se encuentra escondido en una unidad de almacenamiento, el NCIS reabre un caso de personas desaparecidas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Erin está conflictuada cuando Jamie y Eddie le piden que elimine los cargos antiguos contra Parker Mack (Spencer House), un hombre que valientemente rescató a una mujer de una situación de rehenes.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Una periodista desaparece mientras investiga un reportaje sobre un hombre inocente condenado por asesinato, Danny y Baez esperan que reexaminar el caso original ayude a encontrarla.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que Anthony es baleado mientras entrevista a un testigo para un juicio por asesinato, Erin pide a su archienemigo Danny que lo ayude a encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando Henry es el testigo clave en el caso de Danny y Baez, su constante intromisión molesta tanto a Danny que termina llevándolos a una pista valiosa.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With 13 Rednecks left, the teams become human slingshots to earn their right to stay on the island.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The teams are divided as the rednecks' guts and physical strength are put to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The eleven remaining rednecks are put to the test after a grueling reckoning and with injuries and tempers flaring, one team is almost brought to its knees.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Life on the island finally becomes real after a shocking announcement, which leaves both teams in shambles. As a result, all hell breaks loose when secret alliances are exposed and other alliances are broken.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A battle of the sexes begins after one redneck blatantly goes against their alliance. After a challenge that has everyone scrambling to show their worth, the new pecking order within the group is clearly established.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Island life takes its toll on the seven remaining rednecks, especially the "all-girl alliance" which begins to crack under the strain of petty jealousies.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the final five battle it out for a spot in the finale. The rednecks must endure a challenge full of ups and downs in order to receive a mouth-watering reward.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The starting field of fifteen rednecks is now down to the final four until a sudden elimination washes away one redneck's dream of being $100,000 richer.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Twenty- four wild Southerners descend on a picturesque lakehouse in Georgia with $100,000 reasons to win big. But, only one team will split the payday.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Bullets fly as the rednecks shoot their way through another difficult challenge. As a new power couple emerges in the game, another team's new romance is put in jeopardy as they face elimination in The Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The rednecks must face their fears as the challenge takes them to new heights. A newly formed team must learn how to work together both on and off the playing field.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: An action-packed challenge sends the teams flying and lands one player in the hospital. Margaret continues to alienate the rest of the house while Cowboy and Cody almost come to blows.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The team bonds are tested when the Rednecks must rely on each other's strength and endurance to win the challenge. A new romance develops and causes controversy in the house.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A late-night prank angers the house and puts huge targets on the prankster's backs. The rednecks have a hard time keeping down what Steve is dishing up at the challenge and then a grudge match is settled at The Pit.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/2/2023. In the jungles of Yucatán State, on the eastern edge of Mexico, Longoria explores the home of the ancient Maya, where a fierce pride in that ancestry still permeates every custom and dish, even in the most innovative kitchens.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/9/2023. Travelling to the mountains of Southern Mexico, Longoria discovers the hidden magic of Oaxaca that boasts some of the finest ingredients in Mexico, including chocolate, corn, tomatoes and the much-loved quesillo cheese.

programme.title: Diana
programme.desc: Aired 10/31/2021. Great Britain is shocked to discover the truth behind the fairytale marriage of Charles and Diana - but come out to fully support a Princess they love.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Jesús, el niño Dios

programme.title: Jesús, nuestro Señor
programme.desc: Ultima parte de la trilogía dedicada a la vida de Jesús, donde se narran vida pública, pasión y muerte.

programme.title: La Virgen de Guadalupe
programme.desc: En 1531, las tropas españolas atacan a los indígenas y Temoch, un joven líder azteca, trata de detener la masacre. Mientras, la Virgen María se le aparece al indígena Juan Diego para que transmita su mensaje que unión y paz.

programme.title: Jesus, Maria y Jose
programme.desc: Por la presecución del Rey Herodés de Judea, el niño Jesús y sus padres Maria y José huyen por el desierto de Egipto, donde el niño aprende sus primeras letras, culminando con al iniciacíon de su vida secreta.

programme.title: Jesús, el niño Dios
programme.desc: En Belén nace Jesús, el salvador enviado por Dios, pero el rey Herodes dispone que mueran todos los menores de tres años. Un ángel avisa a José para que se refugie con su familia en Egipto y un legionario conduce a la familia por el desierto.

programme.title: Manhattan en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Cuando una viuda seductora le pide a un periodista que resuelva la misteriosa muerte de su marido, la investigación lo sumerge en un peligroso mundo de adulterio, chantaje y asesinato.

programme.title: Aventura en Alaska
programme.desc: Tras graduarse de la Universidad Emory en 1992, el estudiante estrella y atleta Christopher McCandless abandonó sus posesiones, entregó sus ahorros de $24.000 a la caridad y se fue a dedo hasta Alaska a vivir en la naturaleza.

programme.title: Encima de la hora
programme.desc: Gene llega a su casa después de asistir al funeral de su exesposa. Al poco tiempo, secuestran a su hija. Recibe una pistola y la tarea de matar a una persona en una hora y quince minutos. De lo contrario, su hija será asesinada.

programme.title: Un perdedor sin suerte
programme.desc: Ferrell nunca ha estado mejor (Galán) como un vendedor que pierde a su esposa y su trabajo en el mismo día y, ante el colapso de su vida, empieza a vivir en su patio delantero.

programme.title: John Grisham's: el poder de la justicia
programme.desc: Matt Damon es Rudy Baylor, un abogado novato superado por un caso de alto perfil. En su contra, un ejército de tiburones de la ley. De su lado, Deck Shifflet, un batallador "para-abogado" que nunca consiguió obtener su título.

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: Jamie Foxx presenta la inspiradora historia real del director de una banda de música de instituto que transformó a su variopinta banda de jazz en un legendario grupo de funk que arrasó en todo el país.

programme.title: Manhattan en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Cuando una viuda seductora le pide a un periodista que resuelva la misteriosa muerte de su marido, la investigación lo sumerge en un peligroso mundo de adulterio, chantaje y asesinato.

programme.title: Como asesinar a una millonaria
programme.desc: Joan Rivers interpreta a la ama de casa de Beverly Hills, Irma Summers, quien está convencida de que su esposo planea matarla.

programme.title: Honor y mentira
programme.desc: Dos novios de secundaria ingresan en academias militares separadas, lo que pone en peligro su relación cuando uno es infiel.

programme.title: Implacable
programme.desc: Max, en su imaginación, es un implacable galán que hace suspirar a las mujeres. Su vida dará un giro cuando convence a Dan, un joven listo, atleta y culto, a que lo tome bajo su tutela, y ambos compiten por el amor de la misma mujer.

programme.title: Prueba de amor
programme.desc: Desde que se conocen en medio del caos de la universidad en Nueva York, Al (Freddie Prinze Jr.) e Imogen (Julia Stiles) comienzan una aventura romántica en la que el amor verdadero a veces compite con la tentación de alejarse del compromiso.

programme.title: Ni en tus sueños
programme.desc: En esta comedia, Kirk, un tipo común, no puede creer su suerte cuando la exitosa y preciosa Molly se enamora de él. Sus amigos listos, su familia loca y hasta su insoportable exnovia están tan conmocionados como él.

programme.title: La terminal
programme.desc: Luego de llegar al aeropuerto JFK de Nueva York, Viktor Navorski se encuentra atrapado involuntariamente en vaivenes burocráticos que no le permiten regresar a su país ni entrar a los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Hermosas chicas
programme.desc: La reunión de diez años de la secundaria genera sorpresas para un grupo de amigos. Los chicos declaran que están listos para ir de fiesta con las "chicas hermosas", pero en realidad, siguen teniendo dificultades para descifrar al sexo opuesto.

programme.title: Fama
programme.desc: Fama es la inspiradora historia de un grupo de bailarines, cantantes, músicos y actores de la Escuela Secundaria de Artes Escénicas de la Ciudad de Nueva York, y su enérgico impulso por hacer realidad sus sueños de estrellato.

programme.title: Sobredosis
programme.desc: Dos policías con puntos de vista y métodos opuestos se ven obligados a trabajar juntos para resolver un sangriento atropello que puede estar relacionado con el asesinato de dos adolescentes.

programme.title: La hora de tu muerte
programme.desc: Las superestrellas de la WWE Dolph Ziggler y Kane protagonizan esta emocionante película de suspenso y acción sobre un policía que compite contra el tiempo para detener a un terrorista loco y salvar a un niño.

programme.title: Fled: Corre por tu vida
programme.desc: Una divertida e ingeniosa aventura de acción. Fled sigue el rastro de dos prisioneros fugitivos en su carrera por encontrar un alijo oculto y un disco incriminatorio, que podría terminar con la mafia cubana o matarlos.

programme.title: Contacto sangriento 2
programme.desc: EL campeón de kickboxing Eric Sloane es paralizado en el ring por el malvado Tong Po. El hermano menor de Eric, Kurt, busca venganza. Kurt aprende Muay-Thai del gurú de la pelea Xian Chow.

programme.title: El vengador del futuro
programme.desc: Es el año 2084 D.C.y a Doug Quaid lo persiguen sueños recurrentes de un viaje a Marte, el planeta vecino más cercano a la Tierra. Vive en una época que ha sobrevivido otra guerra mundial y donde las elecciones para el gobierno ya no existen.

programme.title: CAOS
programme.desc: Dos policías, un novato (Phillippe) y un veterano de cabellos grises (Statham), persiguen a un hábil ladrón de bancos (Snipes).

programme.title: La última pelea
programme.desc: La última pelea" narra la conmovedora e inspiracional historia de la familia Conlon, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) y Paddy (Nick Nolte), quienes encuentran redención en la arena al luchar para arreglarse a sí mismos y a su familia.

programme.title: Camino a Marte
programme.desc: Fue amor a primera vista entre José y Abril, pero un accidente causa la muerte de José. En el cielo lo tiene todo, excepto a Abril. José convence a su ángel de la guardia de dejarlo volver a Tierra.

programme.title: Odio el amor
programme.desc: A teenager loses his hearing after a terrible accident. Shortly after, he falls in love with a foreign girl living in Mexico. He then finds out that being in love makes him hear again.

programme.title: La virgen de agosto (LAS)
programme.desc: Eva decide quedarse durante agosto en Madrid, todo un acto de fe, para poder ver y sentir las cosas de otra manera y encontrar nuevas oportunidades.

programme.title: Besos de Azúcar
programme.desc: Nacho es un niño que intenta sobrevivir los primeros años de su adolescencia como refugiado bailando en una máquina. Su vida cambia drásticamente cuando conoce a Mayra.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Tod@s caen
programme.desc: Tras su éxito en la taquillera pelicula No Manches Frida 2, Omar Chaparro y Martha Higared llegan a la gran pantalla con la divertidísima comedia romántica TODOS CAEN.

programme.title: Mimic
programme.desc: Del director ganador del Óscar, Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER), llega una batalla, el hombre y la naturaleza. El milagro de la ingeniería creado en el laboratorio evolucionó y comenzó a imitar al depredador más peligroso de todos: el humano.

programme.title: Mimic 2
programme.desc: Una mutación de cucarachas asesinas sorprende a la ciudad de Nueva York. Se crean imitaciones para infiltrar su grupo y acabar con ellas, pero estas evolucionan y se transforman en seres humanos para seguir acabando con la humanidad.

programme.title: Mimic 3: sentinel
programme.desc: Los bichos están de regreso en la tercera parte de Mimic. Después de que un grupo de personas comienzan a desaparecer, un hombre hipersensible a los gérmenes y confinado a una burbuja protectora pretende ser detective y descifrar el fenómeno.

programme.title: Las ruinas
programme.desc: "The Ruins" sigue a un grupo de amigos que se ven atrapados en una lucha brutal de supervivencia después de visitar una remota excavación arqueológica en la selva mexicana donde descubren un ser mortal entre las ruinas.

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: Mimic
programme.desc: Del director ganador del Óscar, Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER), llega una batalla, el hombre y la naturaleza. El milagro de la ingeniería creado en el laboratorio evolucionó y comenzó a imitar al depredador más peligroso de todos: el humano.

programme.title: La maldición
programme.desc: En este thriller apasionante y sobrenatural con las estrellas más populares de Hollywood, un temor del estudio crece hasta convertirse en una vertiginosa pesadilla para un profesor y tres sujetos atrapados en una mansión misteriosa.

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: Tira a mamá del tren
programme.desc: Un ex-marido amargado, un niño de mamá. Ambos la quieren muerta, pero ¿quién se encargará de hacerlo?.

programme.title: Solteras indisponibles
programme.desc: Tres niñas pequeñas, mejores amigas, conocen a un hechicero que les concede un deseo: tener la misma suerte en el amor. Varios años después, cada una de ellas tiene su propia vida hasta que un día un evento inesperado cambia sus destinos

programme.title: La Seducción
programme.desc: El hilarante Steve Martin protagoniza esta historia oscura y cómica de un buen hombre en una mala situación. Con Helena Bonham Carter, Laura Dern y Scott Caan.

programme.title: El ascenso
programme.desc: Dos asistentes del gerente principal de una corporación de supermercados compiten entre sí para ganarse un ascenso en la compañía.

programme.title: Viaje censurado
programme.desc: Cuatro amigos emprenden un viaje de 3000 kilómetros para recuperar un video ilícito enviado por error a una amiga.

programme.title: El dictador
programme.desc: Los creadores y las estrellas de Borat traen esta asombrosa comedia sobre lo que pasa cuando el peor dictador del mundo llega a los Estados Unidos ¡Prepárate para llorar de risa con esta comedia delirante y bochornosamente divertida!

programme.title: Superhéroes: la película
programme.desc: A un adolescente huérfano le muerde una libélula radioactiva, dándole poderes sobrehumanos en esta parodia de películas como ‘Spider-Man’, ‘X-Men’ y ‘Los cuatro fantásticos’.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: Breakheart Pass
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Along Came Jones
programme.desc: Gary Cooper gives a marvelous, tongue-in-cheek performance as a fumble-fingered cowpoke who is mistaken for a notorious bandit and almost gets killed by both sides of the law...all while managing to capture the attention of Loretta Young.

programme.title: High Noon
programme.desc: Gary Cooper won the Oscar for the Best Actor in this classic tale of a lawman who stands alone to defend a town of cowardly citizens against a gang of revenge-seeking criminals.

programme.title: Vera Cruz

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Emboscada en la escuela dominical
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre es asesinado a tiros en su propio garaje, la policía descubre que una herida sufrida por la afligida viuda puede haber sido autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un barco camaronero de dos hombres se hundió cuando una violenta tormenta de rápido movimiento azotó la costa de Luisiana. El capitán se ahogó y el marinero fue rescatado catorce horas después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró a Janice Johnson muerta al pie de las escaleras del sótano. La policía de Nueva Escocia tuvo que desenredar las circunstancias que rodearon la muerte de Janice y responder a la pregunta: ¿Fue un accidente o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un incendio sospechoso arrasó un apartamento y mató a dos mujeres jóvenes. La causa del incendio y la identidad de las víctimas no estaban claras.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre el cuerpo descompuesto de una adolescente, la policía no tiene pistas sobre su identidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Pearl Smith, residente de Maine, desaparece después de una discusión con su esposo, Bill Bruns. Los investigadores encuentran un rastro de sangre que conduce al sótano de la pareja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Batallón de pruebas
programme.desc: Una madre de dos niños pequeños fue encontrada muerta en su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Leann Fletcher, los investigadores usan análisis de salpicaduras de sangre y computación forense para encontrar el motivo de su asesinato: su esposo, estaba teniendo una aventura con la jueza Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intrusión bienvenida
programme.desc: Un hombre le dice a la policía que le disparó a un intruso que había atacado y asesinado a su esposa. El marido pinta un cuadro trágico y es apodado héroe.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, Kathryn Bishop de 82 años es encontrada muerta en su hogar de Pennsylvania. Pequeñas pistas en el cuerpo de la víctima le dirán a la policía lo que pasó esa noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Laura Houghteling desapareció de su casa en Bethesda y nunca más se la volvió a ver. Los científicos forenses usan evidencia de su habitación para dirigir a la policía hacia un sospechoso principal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Bruce Miller fue asesinado a tiros en la oficina del negocio de depósito de chatarra que poseía. La escena del crimen estaba casi inmaculada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sombra de duda
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros en su tienda solo un día antes de testificar contra el hombre acusado de robarla.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los sobrevivientes de las atrocidades nazis reconocieron al arzobispo Trifa, exjefe de la Iglesia Ortodoxa Rumana en los Estados Unidos, por haber dirigido un sangriento ataque contra los judíos durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Lleno de humo
programme.desc: Cuando una pareja de ancianos murió en un sospechoso incendio en casa, su hijo se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp winds down the pressure skyrockets. No one wants to be sent home now. The ladies start to crack under the pressure. Another one is sent home. Will this be the final cut?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli announces the official squad and the women realize the hard-fought dream of becoming a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Full of excitement and nerves, the squad prepares for their very first football game at AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 125 remaining hopefuls must nail a choreographed routine before advancing to the final rounds, and the DCC veterans reveal their plans for the future.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winning choreographer Travis Wall tests the hopefuls' contemporary dance skills, Kelli and Judy make show group selections, and Melissa Rycroft teaches injury prevention.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A veterinary technician chases her dream, Kelli has an uncomfortable conversation about an applicant's weight, and the women explore their new city.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With so many strong candidates, Kelli realizes some of the cuts may not be dance-based, and media simulation day proves to be problematic for a few of the candidates.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC hopefuls try on the iconic uniform for cameos, show off their hip-hop skills for celebrity choreographer Marty Kudelka and learn table manners in an etiquette class.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the first football game approaches, Kelli and Judy watch tape on AT&T Stadium's famously large HD screens to see who is game day-ready -- and figure out the final cuts.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie are the best of friends. But Ellie is starting to want more…Marco though can’t seem to respond in kind. He’s more and more confused about what and who he’s looking for…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When class clown JT acts up in Science class, his teacher Ms. Hatzilakos gives him a serious detention - assisting her with the guinea pigs all week. JT’s annoyed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Sean. He and Emma are back together. He’s a star on the basketball team. And he and Jimmy have buried the hatchet. Jimmy’s even invited him to a party. But the good feelings don’t last for long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Liberty can’t believe it when she doesn’t make the Girls Floor Hockey team – she’s never failed at anything. So when Coach Hatzilakos asks her to be the Team Manager, Liberty throws all her energy into managing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy are back together, but it doesn’t feel quite the same. Ash may not look the same as last year – she’s a Goth now – but Jimmy’s sure she’s still the same golden girl inside.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s mom is away for a few days and it’s just her and her step-dad, Mr. Simpson. He’s supportive of Emma’s involvement in “Food for Thought”; the student group who wants to remove genetically modified (GM) foods from the school cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being in counseling for a long time, Paige is positive she’s recovered from her date rape. In fact, she’s convinced her life is back to normal – Dean and what he did are behind her forever. She never wants to see him again, so she’s dismissive.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s exam time and everyone’s stressed – especially Craig. In a surprise visit from his father, Craig learns that his dad is very eager to have him back in his life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Although his father is gone, Craig wants to get on with his life as normal. He insists on going back to school immediately and becomes frustrated with his friends when they behave with concern.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The pending birth a new baby for Spike and Snake inspires Emma to search for her birth father. With some detective work, Emma discovers that her father, Shane, lives just outside the city.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s on a mission this year—it’s bye bye cute and hello hot. That means midriff baring tops, low-riders and thongs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner just can’t deal with the fact that Marco’s gay so he tries to cut Marco out of life. But when the guys all go to see Dylan’s hockey game, Jimmy makes sure that Marco comes along.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things haven’t been going very well for Sean lately. Emma’s busy dealing with Snake’s illness and a brand new baby brother and Tracker’s busy leading the exciting life a normal 20-something.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are pretty hot between Craig and Ashley, but he’s disappointed that she keeps pulling back from going all the way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Life’s getting more and more stressful for Ellie—her dad just left on another Peacekeeping Mission, her mom’s drinking again and she’s interning for Caitlin Ryan’s tv show. As things get more and more hectic, Ellie has no one to help her cope.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides it’s time to move on in matters of the heart when she realizes she has feelings for new kid Chris.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri’s in heaven-- not only does she have a terrific boyfriend, the wonderful romantic Rick, she also has the lead in the school play!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are back on track for Emma now that she’s officially over Sean. Chris has even asked her out! But when she hears rumours that Sean’s part of a gang stealing things from Degrassi (including Mr. Simpson’s laptop)

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s a big gymnastics meet at Degrassi, and Manny’s going to lead the team to gold! But when she starts to feel sick, she fears that her queasy stomach might be more than the flu or even a bad nerves.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s tempted by the romantic family scenario Craig paints and begins to think she and Craig really could keep this baby. Even Ashley shares the news with the entire cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Five kids from different worlds are stuck in a room -- on a Saturday! When Raditch introduces Saturday detention, Sean, Ellie, Hazel, Jimmy and Toby are the first inductees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Scientists investigate the meteorite impact responsible for the extinction of dinosaurs. According to a theory, the event was triggered by a comet hitting the present-day Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of the discovery and reconstruction in Argentina of the world's largest known dinosaur, a brand new species of titanosaur. Measuring 37m long, it now holds the record as the biggest animal ever to walk the earth.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Horror of Fang Rock
programme.desc: A thick fog surrounds Fang Rock as an alien menace stalks the island.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Horror of Fang Rock

programme.title: Doctor Who: Horror of Fang Rock

programme.title: Doctor Who: Destiny Of The Daleks

programme.title: Doctor Who: Destiny Of The Daleks

programme.title: Doctor Who: Destiny Of The Daleks

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Invasion of Time

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Invasion of Time

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Invasion of Time

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Invasion of Time

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Invasion of Time

programme.title: Doctor Who: City of Death
programme.desc: While on holiday in Paris, the Doctor and Romana experience time distortion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: City of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: City of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: City of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: Shada
programme.desc: Chris Parsons is happily engrossed in studying post-graduate physics at Cambridge, when one day he finds an old book, sitting on a dusty shelf in an ageing professor's library.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Logopolis

programme.title: Doctor Who: Logopolis
programme.desc: The Doctor travels to Logopolis where a series of fateful events are set in motion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Logopolis

programme.title: Doctor Who: Logopolis

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps actor and comedian Kathy Griffin with her two rescue dogs, Chance and Pom Pom, who are disobedient and territorial.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two troubled dogs, and their families, win sessions with Cesar after auditioning at a pet store in Orange County, Calif.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Doberman/Lab and a pit bull develop behavioral issues after not being walked for months; an Italian greyhound acts aggressively toward the men of the house.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Dave Glassman adopts pit bulls Blackjack and Memphis together, but one day during a barking fit, the two dogs turn on each other.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar works to dial down the bad behaviors of four problem dogs who won sessions at the PETCO auditions.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar celebrates the show's 100th episode with a grand reunion of many of the past guests and their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Daschund Lotus is very territorial; his aggression sends his owner Chari to the hospital; Cesar makes a house call to see Joey, a German Shepard who is territorial over the second story of his owner's home.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A French bulldog is nervous around other dogs and occasionally nips at people; a Vizsla who resists going outside due to her fear of cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A couple's Chihuahua mix terrorizes their mastiff and dominates the house; a pit bull is not growing out of his puppy behavior.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive English bulldog/Lab mix; a cocker spaniel with a life-threatening appetite for paper products.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Labrador mix with dog aggression; a Jack Russell terrier and a Queensland heeler whose formerly cordial relationship has become hostile.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Maltese hates being on his leash; an American Eskimo barks and circles strangers who enter the house; a Nova Scotia duck tolling retriever with a fear of pools.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a pregnant Ashlee Simpson-Wentz's English bulldog with his aggression issues before the baby arrives; a retriever with food aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive sheepdog/collie mix needs extra attention, so Cesar brings him to the Dog Psychology Center; a St. Bernard with a fear of stairs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: New series focusing on the tumultuous home and professional life of bounty hunter Dwayne "Dog" Chapman, and his partner and wife Beth. In the first episode, Dog and team chase Floyd Chapman (no relation), a heavily tattooed bail jumper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Dog sets off from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland with some of his fugitives. First, a stop at Leland's boxing gym to warm up for their day of hunting with a quick sparring session and some father-and-son time together.

programme.title: Pet Heroes
programme.desc: Two seasoned horses are the last hope for a colt trapped in a bog; a quick-thinking Lab finds a remarkable way to save her puppies from rising floodwaters.

programme.title: Lost And Found
programme.desc: Following the work of Dogs Trust, one of Britain's best-loved dog rescue charities, as they find new homes for unwanted and abandoned dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: The Dog Rescuers follows RSPCA inspector, Jason Bowles, on a raid to a suspected puppy breeder, and are shocked at the conditions the animals are found in.

programme.title: 6 Puppies And Us
programme.desc: The owners have made it through the first trying months, but now adolescence hits. For many puppy owners, this is the most trying time of all, with common problems including aggression, humping, and roaming; half of all dogs are abandoned at this stage.

programme.title: Puppy Love Marathon
programme.desc: Celebrate puppies with a Puppython! The cutest puppies, nonstop.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: At Jackie Barlow's farm, Mako the alpaca has a lump on his face that's the size of half a football! And Mako is louder than a football crowd, with Julian admitting he's one of his noisiest patients ever.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian Norton visits a local farm to de-horn some lively young bullocks. Back at the surgery, he and Peter Wright try to save the life of a dog that has got a large bone wedged in its oesophagus.

programme.title: Dogs On The Job
programme.desc: It might be hard to look at a Chihuahua and see how it could have descended from the gray wolf, , but this is where all dogs come from

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter tackles the most overgrown tortoise beak he's ever seen. Julian treats a Vizsla puppy that's eaten a washing up sponge for the 2nd time. David attends a ewe who has suffered a life-threatening prolapse. A donkey finds a new home.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian needs as many extra pairs of hands as he can muster as he has to perform a caesarean section on a pregnant Great Dane. Later, young vet Matt marries his fiancee Katherine in front of all of his veterinary friends.

programme.title: To The Rescue
programme.desc: Tommy joins dedicated volunteers in South Texas, rescuing stray dogs from dangerous conditions at "The Dumping Grounds."

programme.title: Going To the Dogs
programme.desc: With the Show of Shows looming on the horizon, Laurie strives for that ever-elusive Best in Show ribbon with her poodle, Monet.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Crawford's are searching for a brand new puppy to become their next family member. Mom and dad are going to have to help their kids control the excitement as they visit an English Mastiff, An English Bulldog and a Doberman Pinscher.

programme.title: America's Cutest Puppies
programme.desc: After searching the country and sniffing out hundreds of dogs, the ultimate competition has arrived. The ten regional winners from each city have made it out to L.A. to compete for the first-ever title of "America's Cutest Puppy" and the grand prize.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Scaife family is looking for a puppy to keep up with their three energetic kids. How will they ever decide between the Australian Labradoodle, the Bouvier and the Miniature Schnauzer?

programme.title: Animals Unleashed
programme.desc: A monkey hill, raccoons get Easter treats, and a lucky sea lion hitches a ride. And in our Top 5, a cat uses the potty.

programme.desc: Lyndal and Amanda meet some baboons and their babies alongside the road on the way to see the famous Baobab tree, once there they see and buy some local word statues/carvings.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Galapagos - Darwin's Eden
programme.desc: Situated 1,000km west of Ecuador in South America, the Galapagos archipelago contains 13 main islands and a hundred or so smaller rocks and reefs. The region's wilderness is so pristine and rich in life it altered our entire view of the natural world.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: For every baby animal born, billions don't make it. Drought, flood, famine and predation; babies are born into a harsh world. The odds are so heavily stacked against some animals that it's a miracle any of their youngsters survive at-all.

programme.title: Nigel Marven's Cruise Ship Adventures
programme.desc: Nigel's Indian Ocean journey begins in Mumbai, where he spots Indian Flying Foxes and encounters extraordinary leopards. Amidst city life, a thrilling encounter with a real cobra electrifies all, making for a bold wildlife experience.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: This episode explores nature's deadliest killers. From a tiny but deadly insect, to a pod of hungry Orca's, predators come in all sizes, and are found on every continent on Earth.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time in the Cheetah diaries, Chobe, who seemed to be in the running to be the next top cat, contracts a mystery illness. Meanwhile, the cheetah cubs have to be kept in isolation, missing out on some crucial training.

programme.title: Fearless Mr Fox
programme.desc: The fox: portrayed as a sly and cunning character in stories and mythology across the globe. In reality, the fox is one of the most successful carnivores on the planet.

programme.title: Wild Colombia With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: Nigel Marven explores Colombia's Pacific coast, which is home to giant geckos, glowing beetles and some bright and vividly coloured frogs.

programme.title: On The Trails Of The Glaciers
programme.desc: Mission to Caucasus

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Sri Lanka - Monsoon Island
programme.desc: Lying like a teardrop in the Indian Ocean, Sri Lanka is an island that defies convention. Poised just six degrees above the equator, it's less than 75,000 km sq in size. But it has enough wildlife to rival a continent.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Raja Ampat

programme.title: THE BEST OF WORLDS: LIFE AT ITS ALPINE LIMITS
programme.desc: For 5000 years man has sought to inhabit the more accessible areas of Europe, but at its very heart, in the high zones of the Alps, there exists a world parallel to ours.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Zanzibar

programme.title: Rock Of Ages
programme.desc: Rocks are the memory of our planet. Their constant reforming cycle captures moments in time, so if you want to know about evolution, extinction, or creation, look in the rocks. The question is, are you ready to rock?

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Jess meets her new partner, Nicole Scott; a teenage girl disappears in a crowded department store.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Jess and Nicole search for a missing woman who they suspect is a murder victim.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: A judge is blackmailed during a high profile mob trial.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: A father is killed in a car accident and his infant son mysteriously disappears from the accident.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Jess and Nicole investigate when a busload of people goes missing during a casino tour; the bus disappears on its way from Philadelphia to Atlantic City.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Tal battles to keep up with his new classmates; Sage makes an unexpected announcement; Davis is faced with a family issue that could derail his future.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Janelle and Dondre can't seem to hide their true feelings; alliances at High Water are challenged.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Sage's troubles start trending; Dondre discovers that Janelle has been keeping a secret from him.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Odalie finds out why Davis has been skipping class; King's loyalties are torn; Tal finally makes a move on his crush.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Tensions flare at Dondre and Janelle's over-the-top party; Johnny forces Tal to face the truth about who he is.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Poppy and Janelle open up to one another; Rigo and Dondre grapple with the events of the party.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace is torn between pursuing Bob Whitmore's past and her family; Lady Mae and Bishop face challenges to their seedling dream of a new church; Jacob makes a discovery about the mansion's history.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace discovers a key informant during her investigation into Edenvale Lending; Charity's desire to honor the church's past may threaten her future within it; Bishop decides to take the issue of the house into his own hands.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Holding a small service at home, the Greenleaf family contemplates its future and what it might mean to start over; Noah shares an insight into the house's history; Lady Mae goes to see Tara James and returns with a startling revelation.
